world_date: Month of the Ashen Veil, Year 1 of the Hollow Accord

recent_events.text: Queen Lythara the Veiled executed a Velorn clan elder in open court. No reason was given. The other clans watch in silence.
Three deep-mine shafts collapsed simultaneously. Thane Ulric Ironmaul has sealed the lower districts. Reformers demand answers.
King Roderic Thorne II missed the Feast of Embers — first time in 30 years. Succession whispers flood Eresteron's taverns.
A Gilgeth orc caravan was found slaughtered on the trade road. Survivors were incoherent, reeking of blackbloom resin.
The Monastery of Druids performed a Rite of Unmaking at the standing stones. Nearby villages reported silence — no birds, no wind, for three days.

active_tensions.description: The sealed lower mines hide something. Isolationists claim safety; reformers claim a cover-up. A schism inches closer each day.
Clan Arkenor has been raiding Wayfarer scouting paths. Sovereign Elowen has not yet responded — but her silence is not peace.
Admiral Electorate demands expanded harbor rights in Eldoria. King Roderic's court is divided; his weakness emboldens Tidefall's ambitions.
Blackbloom opium trade is fracturing orc caravan alliances. Both cities blame each other for the drug's spread. Blood is close.

character_updates.name: Queen Lythara the Veiled
character_updates.status: Consolidating power. Clan Velorn is cowed; Nythariel and Arkenor are restless but obedient — for now.

character_updates.name: Thane Ulric Ironmaul
character_updates.status: Haggard and secretive. Has not slept in the upper halls for two weeks. His axe has not left his side.

character_updates.name: Sovereign Elowen Silverleaf
character_updates.status: Convening the Wayfarers in private. Her calm exterior masks a quietly sharpening resolve.

character_updates.name: King Roderic Thorne II
character_updates.status: Ailing. Appears in court only briefly. Two sons and a niece are already positioning for succession.

character_updates.name: Pirate King Rowen
character_updates.status: In exile, location unknown. A ship bearing his black-and-copper standard was spotted near Tidefall waters.

character_updates.name: Admiral Electorate
character_updates.status: Pressing every political advantage. Three new warships commissioned. Smiles too easily at funerals.

faction_morale.reason: Lythara's brutal display enforces loyalty through fear. Unity is performative but functional.
Mine collapses, sealed districts, and leadership silence are eroding trust in Thane Ironmaul.
Wayfarers remain cohesive, but Arkenor raids are testing pacifist doctrine among younger elves.
King Roderic's visible decline stokes succession anxiety. Trade disputes with Tidefall bite at commerce.
New warships and political gains fuel confidence. The Admiral's ambition is infectious among her officers.
Blackbloom addiction is hollowing out caravan guilds. Inter-city blame is replacing inter-city trade.
The Rite of Unmaking was completed. Whatever it cost, the Druids seem satisfied — and that is unsettling.
Glass trade revenue is strong. They observe all faction tensions with ledger-cold patience.

whispers.text: They say what Ironmaul sealed in the deep mines isn't a collapse — it's a door. And something knocked from the other side.
Lythara didn't execute the Velorn elder for treason. She executed him because he *recognized* something in her face.
Rowen's ship wasn't spotted near Tidefall by accident. Someone sent him a letter. Someone inside Eldoria's court.
The Rite of Unmaking at Stonebreak wasn't worship. The druids were *answering* something that called to them first.

weather_and_omens.condition: Perpetual grey overcast. Fog clings to the canopy floors. Shadows fall at wrong angles near Clan Arkenor holdings.
Unseasonably warm underground. Miners report the stone itself feels feverish to the touch.
Ice Dragon activity increasing. Three Frostwarden elders have descended from their high aeries — unprecedented.
Dust storms obscuring trade roads. Vilefin Goblin scouts have pulled back from their usual ranges without explanation.
Dead calm following the Rite. No natural sound for miles. Livestock will not face the standing stones.

absorbed_lore: Queen Lythara publicly executed a Velorn elder; cause deliberately obscured — power consolidation underway in Shadow Court.
Lostfeld lower mines sealed by Thane Ironmaul following triple shaft collapse; nature of threat unknown but suspected non-geological.
King Roderic Thorne II is visibly ailing; succession contest forming around two sons and a niece.
Blackbloom opium addiction is destabilizing Gilgeth and Groth orc caravan infrastructure; inter-city blame game escalating.
Monastery of Druids completed a Rite of Unmaking at Stonebreak standing stones; surrounding nature fell silent for three days.
Pirate King Rowen's ship spotted near Tidefall waters; suspected contact with someone inside Eldoria's court.
Three Ice Dragon Frostwarden elders descended from Dragonscar Peaks — no precedent in living memory.
Gloomspire Gnomes are passively monitoring all faction tensions; glass monopoly and mountain pass control kept intact.
Admiral Electorate commissioned three new warships; pressing for expanded harbor rights in Eldoria.
Clan Arkenor conducting raids on Glenhaven Wayfarer paths; Sovereign Elowen's response is pending but sharpening.
